figures.caption: TABLE III REAL-LLM EVALUATION ON MMLU (200 ATTEMPTED RANDOM ITEMS, ALL-SUBJECTS TEST SPLIT) AND GSM8K (200 ATTEMPTED RANDOM ITEMS, TEST SPLIT). THE n COLUMN REPORTS VALID/EVALUABLE ITEMS AFTER ANSWER PARSING AND FILTERING. AGENTS: GPT-5, CLAUDE-OPUS-4-6, GEMINI-2.5-PRO. JUDGE: CLAUDE-OPUS-4-6. SPRT THRESHOLDS α = β = 0.05, Rmax = 8, CALIBRATION FIT ON A DISJOINT n = 40 SUBSET PER TASK. AVG CALLS COUNTS THE CALLS REQUIRED BY EACH PROTOCOL; THE FIXED-5 BASELINE DOES NOT RUN A PER-ROUND STOPPING JUDGE.
